name: fantasy
description: CC0 fantasy BGM pack for longer looping sessions. Replaces the idle/work/dungeon background tracks with calmer, longer OpenGameArt music while leaving starter SFX untouched.
credits: Village of Snow by Chris Murphy (OpenGameArt, public domain). SNES RPG Overworld by Pheontis (OpenGameArt, public domain as of Jan 2017). Great Labyrinth by Mintodog (OpenGameArt, CC0).
